subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §15 Expected Value of a Discrete Random Variable
question: An urn contains 30 marbles of which 8 are black, 12 are red, and 10 are blue. Randomly, select four marbles without replacement. Let $X$ be the number black marbles in the sample of four. (a) What is the probability that no black marble was selected? (b) What is the probability that exactly one black marble was selected? (c) Compute $E(X)$.
